services.title: Service Management
services.subtitle: Run white-listed server operations (pm2 / nginx / certbot). Every command is executed via execFile with strict parameter validation — user input is never passed to a shell.
services.reloadNginxDesc: Test (nginx -t) and reload the Nginx configuration.
services.renewSslDesc: Run certbot renew to renew TLS certificates.
services.updateNginxConfigDesc: Generate and write the site config from domain / port / email, then reload.
services.restoreDefaultConfigDesc: Overwrite the active config with the built-in default template, then reload.
services.emptyOutput: No output yet. Run an action to see its log.
services.invalidDomain: Please enter a valid domain (e.g. www.example.com).
services.invalidPort: Port must be an integer between 80 and 65535.
services.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
services.permissionNote: Note: nginx -s reload and certbot renew usually require root / restricted sudo. If an action fails, ask the operator to grant the limited privilege or run it manually.
